A.does: The central WSGI application object that serves as the runtime registry for URL rules, view functions, extensions, and configuration.

B.does: A reusable collection of routes and app functions defined without an application object, deferring registration until attached to a live app.

comparison: Blueprints attach to a Flask app via `app.register_blueprint()`, which replays all deferred route and function registrations recorded on the Blueprint against the live application instance.
